name: compound_medication_loader
description: Bulk-load Compound Medications into a Canvas instance. Provides an authenticated POST endpoint for programmatic loads and an app-drawer page for staff to upload a CSV, review the parsed rows, and load them into the formulary.

protocols.description: SimpleAPI endpoint that accepts a JSON payload of compound medications and emits CreateCompoundMedication effects. Hybrid auth: Canvas staff session (in-app) or Bearer token (programmatic).

applications.name: Compound Medication Loader
applications.description: Upload and load compound medications from a CSV.
